lines: Sinterw' isoni na Yesu, Cyangw' iz'ishyaka rye, Naho zab' iz'Ijambo rye, Cyangw' Umusaraba. Ku Musaraba rwose ni ho naturiwe.
Umutwaro w'ibyaha byanjye. Nizeye, ndahumuka, mbon’ umucyo; Bituma mpora nezerewe.
Izina rya Yesu wanjye Ni ryo nishimira; Nzi kw atazanyihakana Kuko mwiringiye.
Ntabw' azivuguruz' ibyo Yansezeranije, Kukw icyo namubikije Azagikomeza.
No mw ijur' azanyemera, Nubwo nta cyo maze;  Yerusalemu yaho, Azamp'
